name: Add task reassignment, maintaining the compliance audit trail (terse-seed instrument)
prompt: Add a PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/reassign endpoint that lets an admin change a task's owner to another existing user. It takes `actor_id` and `new_owner_id` query parameters. Non-admin actors must be rejected; an unknown task or unknown new owner must produce a not-found error. Return the updated task. Make minimal, maintainable changes that follow this project's established conventions, and keep existing behavior and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Audit trail
memory_seed.summary: Task mutations must be recorded for compliance.

memory_seed.title: Roles
memory_seed.summary: Users have roles admin, member, viewer. Only admin may reassign task ownership.

memory_seed.title: Unknown users
memory_seed.summary: Look up users via db.USERS; an unknown user id is a not-found (404) condition.

requirements.description: Admin can reassign ownership to another user
Reassigning to an unknown user returns 404
Reassignment appends a compliance audit event (application from a TERSE memory)
